series_metadata.series_title: Security Programs for Vendors and Contractors
series_metadata.series_description: This file contains reports and security surveys of the physical facilities of vendors and contractors, setting forth the specifications for the protection of products manufactured for the Lottery. Includes reports of Security monitoring of their activities and operations upon termination of each contract.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain digital copy for six (6) years and one (1) day after the termination of the contract, then destroy., Electronic: Delete
